title: Implement genre_based_discovery function
description: Implement genre_based_discovery using Spotify recommendations API with seed genres, caching 20 tracks per genre

title: Implement saved tracks cache module to reduce API calls
description: Create a shared caching module (saved_tracks_cache.py) to avoid redundant API calls across make_weekly_mix.py, make_rolling.py, and populate_saved_songs.py when fetching saved tracks. Cache data to JSON with 24-hour expiry.

title: Create saved_tracks_cache.py module
description: Create new module with: get_saved_tracks(), get_tracks_in_date_range(), get_saved_track_keys() functions; cache to data/saved_tracks.json; 24-hour expiry; force_refresh flag support

title: Update make_weekly_mix.py to use cache module
description: Replace manual saved tracks fetching (lines 82-123) with get_saved_track_keys() from cache module. Keep track of cache hit/miss in logs.

title: Update make_rolling.py to use cache module
description: Replace manual saved tracks fetching with get_tracks_in_date_range() from cache module. Ensure date filtering logic is preserved. Add chronological ordering after filtering.

title: Delete populate_saved_songs.py
description: Remove populate_saved_songs.py as it exports to CSV but is not used by other scripts. The new cache module will handle data persistence.

title: Test cache module with all scripts
description: Run make_weekly_mix.py and make_rolling.py with fresh cache, verify cache is used on second run. Test force_refresh flag. Verify chronological ordering preserved in rolling playlists.

title: Migrate existing log files to logs/ with new names
Order rolling playlist tracks by most recent first
description: Update make-rolling.py to sort tracks by added_at date (most recent first) when adding to playlist. Currently tracks are added in the order they were fetched from the API.

title: Test and validate generative weekly mix
description: Manual testing of playlist generation to verify ~8% generative tracks, discovery logging, and all constraints honored

title: Move Python scripts to src/ directory
Implement artist_based_discovery function
description: Implement artist_based_discovery using artist_related_artists API, scanning discographies, caching 20 tracks per artist

title: Update Python scripts to use logs/ directory
Add mean and std random track percentage configuration
description: Add configurable mean and standard deviation for percentage of tracks generated from new artists (default: 10% ± 5%). Round down to integer, minimum 1 track.

title: Create logs/ directory structure
Implement generative discovery using recommendations API
description: Implement simple generative discovery: pick random favorite artist, get recommendations via API, stochastically select one, ensure not favorited, get a song from them. No separate module needed.

title: Update .gitignore for logs directory
Implement discover_track round-robin strategy
description: Implement discover_track function that alternates between genre-based and artist-based discovery, updating discovery_state and returning track with metadata

title: Update shell script to call Python scripts from src/
Update scheduler plist to use logs/ directory
Move data files to data/ directory
Create src/ directory for Python scripts
Integrate generative module into main script
description: Add imports and initialize_discovery call to make-weekly-mix-saved-artists.py with generative_ratio configuration

title: Implement fetch_recent_liked_tracks function
description: Implement fetch_recent_liked_tracks with pagination, 3-month window filtering, and rate limit retry logic

title: Test generative discovery feature
description: Test the new generative discovery feature by running make_weekly_mix.py and verifying new artists appear in playlist.

title: Update playlist description on rolling playlist updates
description: When make-rolling.py updates an existing playlist, it only adds/removes tracks but doesn't update the playlist description with the new 'last updated' date. The description is only set when creating a new playlist.

title: Modify main script loop for generative tracks
description: Update main loop in make-weekly-mix-saved-artists.py to alternate between generative and random selection with observability logging

title: Update populate_saved_songs.py to use data/ directory
Find alternative for generative music discovery
description: Spotify recommendations API is deprecated. Need to find alternative method for discovering new artists/tracks (could use third-party APIs like Last.fm, MusicBrainz, or other music discovery services)

title: Initialize generative discovery module structure
description: Create generative_discovery.py with module interface functions (initialize_discovery, discover_track) and internal function stubs

title: Implement analyze_genres function
description: Implement analyze_genres to extract and rank genres from recent liked tracks, handling missing genre data gracefully

title: Move configuration to YAML file
description: Extract global configuration variables from make_weekly_mix.py to a YAML config file

title: Implement analyze_artists function
description: Implement analyze_artists to categorize artists by frequency and return weighted artist mapping

title: Disable generative calls in weekly mix loop
description: Keep generative helper functions in code, but do not call them from the main playlist loop. Leave alternative discovery work as TODO.
